page: Microsoft Azure NV36adms_A10_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the NVADSA10v5 family. It is powered by dedicated AMD processors providing 36 virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 880.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 24.44 GB per vCPU.

This server features a bundled hardware accelerator consisting of a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 22 GB of dedicated VRAM. For local storage, the instance includes 2949 GB of local disk capacity and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external block storage.

Given the high memory density paired with a dedicated GPU, this instance offers a specialized hardware profile for memory-intensive GPU workloads. It is designed for workloads such as large-scale visualization, deep learning inference, data science pipelines, and memory-heavy database operations that require GPU acceleration alongside substantial system memory.
description: Microsoft Azure NV36adms_A10_v5 is an x86_64 server instance in the NVADSA10v5 family, powered by dedicated AMD processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 36 vCPUs and a substantial 880.0 GB of system memory, providing 24.44 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 22 GB of VRAM, alongside 2949 GB of local storage and compatibility with Premium Storage. This memory-intensive, GPU-accelerated profile is designed for demanding workloads that require significant system memory alongside graphics or compute acceleration. It is highly suited for data science, large-scale visualization, and memory-heavy database operations.
